items.summary: Hollywood actors keep bringing up a potential Red Dead Redemption movie and saying they would love to be in it. After Jack Black revealed he’d love to star in a Red Dead Redemption movie, despite the fact he doesn’t think Rockstar would ever greenlight it, Karl Urban has thrown his hat into the ring.

items.title: Hamlet: 13 Movies Based on Shakespeare's Greatest Tragedy

items.title: « Le registre national des cancers constitue un fourre-tout hétérogène de données sensibles, couvrant de multiples facettes de la vie privée »
